text:
The new session is live.

Afrofuturist Sunrise Build Beats — golden light spilling across the desk before the city fully wakes, warm Rhodes chords easing in under a slow, steady bassline.

The first hour belongs to the ones who show up early.

Press play. Lock in. Build.

Now live on YouTube. Link in bio.

visual.openai_prompt: Create a cinematic lo-fi anime-inspired Afrofuturist coding studio scene for Layer8Culture Radio (not photorealistic). A Black creator is seated FROM BEHIND at a premium coding workstation, calm and focused, wearing a black hoodie with a large number 8 on the back (no face reveal). Sunrise Build Beats art style, framed closer than usual: the keyboard and forearms catch the first warm light directly, a coffee mug sits just off the keyboard with a thin ribbon of steam glowing gold as it rises through a sunbeam; a laptop with code sits open beside the main monitors; multiple monitors show code and a subtle line graph; plants and hanging vines with dew still visible on the leaves; books on system design, clean code, and algorithms stacked on the warm wood desk; West African-inspired pottery and design objects catching the low sun; a blank blue neon sign panel on the wall (an unlit, lettering-free glowing panel - do NOT render any text or letters; branding is composited in afterward). Through a large window is a futuristic African city skyline at full golden sunrise - soft amber mist still clinging to the lower streets, a couple of slow-drifting flying vehicles catching the light, the Afrofuturist towers glowing warm gold at their upper edges while the base of the city is still in soft blue shadow. Color palette: Sunrise Amber #FFB347, Warm Gold #F5A524, Electric Blue #0047FF as a cool counterpoint, pale sky blue overhead. The mood is fresh, unhurried, quietly optimistic - the first hour before the world gets loud. Afrofuturist city view, warm desk lamp, calm study atmosphere, loopable visual, culturally intentional objects, futuristic but grounded, balanced electric-blue and warm gold lighting. High-quality anime illustration, cinematic lighting, clean composition, no extra people, no copyrighted characters. Leave the lower third of the frame as clean, uncluttered dark space for the composited headline. Avoid generic startup office, bright corporate lighting, cheap gamer RGB, cluttered composition, cartoon props, excessive sci-fi armor, robots, fake hologram overload, random neon colors, copyrighted franchise references, garbled screen text, random figurines, tripod-mounted monitors, makeshift setups, rendered text, signage lettering, and garbled typography. avoid photorealism, empty minimal rooms, sparse composition

Compose vertically 9:16 - keep the LOWER THIRD and UPPER THIRD bands clear of faces and fine detail for composited text overlays. Leave the lower third as clean dark negative space. visual.headline: RAINY NIGHT CODING

reel.sora_prompt: A calm cinematic lo-fi loop of an anime-inspired Afrofuturist coding studio during a steady night rain. A slow, gentle push-in from behind the creator toward the rain-streaked window. Rain runs down the glass in slow rivulets, catching electric-blue and neon-cyan smears of city light that ripple and shift subtly with each drop's motion. Steam curls lazily from the mug. The warm gold desk lamp stays constant, a calm anchor against the cool blue outside. One plant leaf sways once in a soft draft. A single distant flying vehicle drifts slowly across the blurred skyline beyond the glass. The motion is unhurried, meditative, and loopable - the feeling of being warm and focused while the storm moves through outside. Sora adds its own gentle ambient rain-and-lofi audio. Clean output - no on-screen text.

youtube_title: Afrofuturist Rainy Night Coding Radio | Lo-Fi Focus Beats #Shorts

visual.openai_prompt: Create a minimal cinematic lo-fi anime-inspired Afrofuturist quote card for Layer8Culture Radio (not photorealistic). Cosmic Focus style, deeply softened and abstracted - Deep Black #030508 fills nearly the entire frame, fading upward into a deep-space Midnight Navy #07111F with a faint scatter of stars. Barely-visible orbit-like UI ring shapes drift at very low opacity in the upper background, like a memory of a workstation display. A low-opacity silhouette of a creator at a desk emerges faintly near the lower edge, a diffuse warm amber lamp-glow the only strong light source, fading quickly into the dark. The impressionistic suggestion of an Afrofuturist city skyline glows in soft electric-blue smears far below, almost dissolved into the navy. Thin waveform arcs drift near the upper frame at minimal opacity. The center and lower third of the frame are clean, dark, near-black negative space for the composited quote headline. Premium music-label quote card feel - deeply calm, saveable, high-contrast, culturally intentional. High-quality anime illustration style, extremely minimal composition, atmospheric cosmic palette. Avoid cluttered scenes, bright corporate lighting, random neon colors, garbled screen text, rendered text, signage lettering, cartoon props, excessive sci-fi armor, robots, fake hologram overload, copyrighted franchise references. avoid photorealism, empty minimal rooms, sparse composition

text:
Layer8Culture Radio is a focus-music channel for builders, creators, coders, students, and dreamers.

Afrofuturist lo-fi, coding beats, and global study sessions for deep work — running 24/7 in the Focus Room.

This is where technology meets culture.

Study. Build. Focus.

Technology has seven layers. We're the eighth.

Follow @Layer8CultureRadio and tune in on YouTube.

visual.openai_prompt: Create a cinematic lo-fi anime-inspired Afrofuturist coding studio hero scene for Layer8Culture Radio (not photorealistic).
